Office of the Registrar Forms Late Enrollment/Registration, Remove an Incomplete Grade; Diploma Request Form; Transcript Information; Graduate Petition for Change of Major or Degree Goal; Application for Readmission; Residency Information. Blank Cards EE Blue and White Cards EE Tentative Program of Study Plan 2 – Blue Card EE Final Program of Study Plan 2 – White Card CS Blue and White Cards CS Tentative Program of Study Plan 2 – Blue Card CS Final Program of Study Plan 2 – White Card Exams Departmental Qualifying Exam Application Non-Senate Academic Request form Dissertation Thesis Departmental Thesis Proposal Application Ph.D. & M.S. Tech Report Submission Form Thesis Seminar Form (Dissertation Talk) EECS Forms & Applications Form(s) Description General Petition This form is used to request for an exception to departmental coursework and requirements: Common Petitions : Transfer of coursework, Special Topics, Prelim Exam – taken at a previous institution, and GSI Waiver – if you have previous TA experience. CS Tentative Program of Study Plan 2 – Blue Card CS Final Program of Study Plan 2 – White Card CS Blue Card :

Common Petitions : Transfer of coursework, Special Topics, Prelim Exam – taken at a previous institution, and GSI Waiver – if you have previous TA experience. CS Tentative Program of Study Plan 2 – Blue Card CS Final Program of Study Plan 2 – White Card CS Blue Card : The blue card (academic planner) must be submitted during the first three-four years in the program. CS White Card : The white card must be submitted and approved, prior to registering for the qualifying exam. Dissertation Talk This dissertation talk form should be completed prior to giving your talk. EE Tentative Program of Study Plan 2 – Blue Card EE Final Program of Study Plan 2 – White Card EE Blue Card : The blue card (academic planner) must be submitted during the first three-four years in the program. EE White Card : The white card must be submitted and approved, prior to registering for the qualifying exam. EECS Petition to Change Class Schedule To request to add/drop an online course, please complete this program approval form. Petition for Retroactive Change in Class Schedule This form is only used to request a retroactive change in class schedule Departmental Qualifying Exam Application Non-Senate Academic Request Higher Education Degree Committee eform Qualifying Exam Application : This departmental form should be completed in order to request to take the qualifying exam, typically after three years or six semesters in the program. Non-Senate Academic Request Form : This form is used to submit a

Application Non-Senate Academic Request Higher Education Degree Committee eform Qualifying Exam Application : This departmental form should be completed in order to request to take the qualifying exam, typically after three years or six semesters in the program. Non-Senate Academic Request Form : This form is used to submit a written justification to the Graduate Division to request for a non-academic senate member to serve on your qualifying exam committee. Higher Education Degree Committee eform : This form is used to officially request approval of your qualifying exam committee from the Graduate Division, see below for more information. Transfer credit petition The transfer form should be completed for each course you intend to transfer. Cancellation/Withdrawal Data Worksheet Withdraw/Cancellation Request form in CalCentral Navigation: CalCentral > My Dashboard > Add a Withdraw Request (Two Forms) CS Progress Review EE Progress Review This form should be completed during your student progress review. PhD & MS Report Submissions Every PhD Dissertation and Masters must submit to the EECS Technical Report Database. Graduate Division Forms Form(s) Description Qualifying Exam Part of the Higher Degree Committee eForm in CalCentral . This application must be received by the Graduate Division at least 3 weeks before the proposed examination date. Job Aid: Qualifying Exam eform Advancement to Candidacy Part of the Higher Degree Committee eForm in CalCentral . This form is required to be submitted the semester after you passed the qualifying exam. Job Aid: Advancement to Candidacy eform Change in Higher Education Committee Part of the

proposed examination date. Job Aid: Qualifying Exam eform Advancement to Candidacy Part of the Higher Degree Committee eForm in CalCentral . This form is required to be submitted the semester after you passed the qualifying exam. Job Aid: Advancement to Candidacy eform Change in Higher Education Committee Part of the Higher Degree Committee eForm in CalCentral . This form is required to be submitted if there is any change to your qualifying exam and/or dissertation committee. Job Aid: Higher Degree Committee eform Filing Fee This form is required to be submitted prior to the start of the semester. Special Enrollment Petition eForm in CalCentral Navigation: CalCentral > My Dashboard > Special Enrollment Petition. Job Aid: Filing Fee Status In Absentia This form is required to be submitted prior to the start of the semester. Special Enrollment Petition eForm in CalCentral Navigation: CalCentral > My Dashboard > Special Enrollment Petition. Job Aid: In Absentia Petition for Parental Leave Special Enrollment Petition eForm in CalCentral Navigation: CalCentral > My Dashboard > Special Enrollment Petition Job Aid: Special Enrollment Petition (SEP) - Parental Leave Certificate of Degree Completion The Certificate of Degree Completion is automatically generated by our system and emailed to students as soon as all steps in the filing process have been completed AND all requirements have been met on the student’s Academic Progress Report (APR). Note: The system takes 2-4 business days for you to receive the certificate of completion. View Open Faculty Positions
